appStore.title: Farm Games Animal Games for Kids Puzzles Free Apps
appStore.description:
Watch the farm spring to life as you explore Old MacDonald's with Lily and her barnyard buddies! Complete puzzles and discover animated scenes full of fun activities and lively characters with a variety of play options for kids of all ages!

ACTIVITIES
• Pick strawberries
• Start a campfire
• Splash mud in the pig pen
• Find hidden treasure
• Harvest veggies in the garden
• Explore the barns and sheds
• Catch fish in the pond
• Help animals cross the bridge
• Pick apples in the orchard
• Fly a crop duster airplane
• Chase chickens on the barnyard
• Play at Granny's house

FEATURES
• Puzzle choices for all ages
• Younger players can skip puzzles 
• Animals and characters come to life
• Animated scenes change on replay
• Professional narration
• Catchy music and sound
• Lots of positive encouragement

A multitude of play options make it accessible for toddlers, preschoolers, kindergarten and elementary age children.

As parents and teachers, we believe in friction-free learning for kids of all ages. We strive to build fun experiences with eye-popping visuals, professional narration, catchy music, and lots of positive encouragement.

Thank you for supporting us and making our vision come to life.

Have fun!

- Blake, Mike & Amanda, Eggroll Games
